footer.pt: Exemplo gerado com trip-template · edite e rode: node lib/render.mjs trip.example.json
footer.en: Example generated with trip-template · edit and run: node lib/render.mjs trip.example.json

note.pt: Saída do Brasil rumo à China, com stopover de 3 noites em Istambul. Chegue em GRU com 3h de antecedência por ser voo internacional.
note.en: Departure from Brazil to China, with a 3-night stopover in Istanbul. Get to GRU 3h early — it's an international flight.

note.pt: De avião ou ônibus até o terminal internacional de Guarulhos.
note.en: By plane or bus to the international terminal in Guarulhos.

note.pt: Ajuste o relógio para o fuso de Istambul (+6h em relação a Brasília) assim que embarcar.
note.en: Set your watch to Istanbul time (+6h vs Brasília) as soon as you board.

note.pt: Chegada e tarde no coração histórico de Sultanahmet. Entrar nos monumentos perto do fim do dia evita as filas.
note.en: Arrival and afternoon in the historic heart of Sultanahmet. Entering the sites late in the day avoids the lines.

note.pt: Transfer ao hotel pelo Havaist bus ou táxi (~50min sem trânsito).
note.en: Transfer to the hotel by Havaist bus or taxi (~50min without traffic).

items.address: Sultanahmet, Ayasofya Meydanı No:1, 34122 Fatih/İstanbul

note.pt: A antiga basílica bizantina (hoje mesquita); o ingresso dá acesso à galeria superior com os mosaicos. Bilheteria oficial: DEM Museums.
note.en: The ancient Byzantine basilica (now a mosque); the ticket gives access to the upper gallery with the mosaics. Official seller: DEM Museums.

items.address: Alemdar, Yerebatan Cd. 1/3, 34110 Fatih/İstanbul

note.pt: Cisterna romana subterrânea, recém-reformada, com iluminação nova — fica ao lado da Hagia Sofia.
note.en: Underground Roman cistern, recently restored with new lighting — right next to Hagia Sophia.

note.pt: Dia cheio de palácios e bazar, fechando com hammam e a Torre de Gálata iluminada à noite.
note.en: A full day of palaces and bazaar, ending with a hammam and the Galata Tower lit up at night.

items.address: Cankurtaran, 34122 Fatih/İstanbul

note.pt: Palácio dos sultões otomanos; o ingresso do Harém é separado e vale a pena (~3h no total).
note.en: Palace of the Ottoman sultans; the Harem ticket is separate and worth it (~3h total).

items.address: Beyazıt, Kalpakçılar Cd. No:22, 34126 Fatih/İstanbul

note.pt: 4000 lojas de tapetes, joias e cerâmica İznik; negocie para ~40-50% do preço inicial.
note.en: 4,000 shops of rugs, jewelry and İznik ceramics; haggle down to ~40-50% of the first price.

items.address: Bereketzade, Galata Kulesi, 34421 Beyoğlu/İstanbul

note.pt: Banho turco no Kılıç Ali Paşa (reserve com 1 semana) e a Torre de Gálata iluminada (entrada até 22h).
note.en: Turkish bath at Kılıç Ali Paşa (book 1 week ahead) and the Galata Tower lit up (entry until 22h).

note.pt: Bate-volta tranquilo de ferry à ilha de Büyükada, com pernoite fora da cidade.
note.en: Relaxed ferry day trip to Büyükada island, with an overnight away from the city.

note.pt: 1h20 de travessia saindo de Kabataş; não há carros na ilha, alugue uma bicicleta.
note.en: 1h20 crossing from Kabataş; no cars on the island, rent a bike.

items.address: Büyükada, Adalar/İstanbul

note.pt: Mosteiro grego ortodoxo no ponto mais alto, com vista 360° do mar de Mármara.
note.en: Greek Orthodox monastery at the highest point, with 360° views of the Sea of Marmara.

note.pt: A ilha esvazia após o último ferry de turistas — noite quieta, ex.: no Splendid Palace (1908).
note.en: The island empties after the last tourist ferry — a quiet night, e.g. at the Splendid Palace (1908).

note.pt: Manhã final em Istambul e voo intercontinental para a China.
note.en: Final morning in Istanbul and the intercontinental flight to China.

note.pt: Volta de ferry e almoço rápido de balık ekmek (sanduíche de peixe) no Corno de Ouro.
note.en: Ferry back and a quick balık ekmek (fish sandwich) lunch at the Golden Horn.

note.pt: Ajuste o relógio para o fuso de Pequim (+11h vs Brasil). A Turkish costuma atrasar nessa rota.
note.en: Set your watch to Beijing time (+11h vs Brazil). Turkish often runs late on this route.

note.pt: Chegada de madrugada e dia leve para vencer o jet lag, com compras de frio e arte urbana.
note.en: Pre-dawn arrival and an easy day to beat jet lag, with cold-weather shopping and street art.

note.pt: Imigração + transfer (~1h ao centro). Cochilo controlado de 1-2h, não mais, para regular o sono.
note.en: Immigration + transfer (~1h to the center). A controlled 1-2h nap, no more, to reset your sleep.

items.address: 2-4 Jiuxianqiao Rd, Chaoyang District, Beijing · 北京市朝阳区酒仙桥路2-4号

note.pt: Antiga zona industrial Bauhaus virada em galerias e arte urbana — passeio de ritmo leve.
note.en: Former Bauhaus industrial zone turned into galleries and street art — an easy-paced walk.

note.pt: Becos antigos de Beiluoguxiang e cerveja artesanal na Great Leap Brewing. Compre HEATTECH na UNIQLO Wangfujing para a muralha amanhã.
note.en: Old Beiluoguxiang alleys and craft beer at Great Leap Brewing. Buy HEATTECH at UNIQLO Wangfujing for the wall tomorrow.

note.pt: Dia inteiro na Grande Muralha — o único dia de muralha, leve roupa de frio (gorro, luvas, primeira pele).
note.en: Full day on the Great Wall — the only wall day, bring warm clothes (beanie, gloves, base layer).

items.address: Mutianyu Village, Bohai Town, Huairou District, Beijing · 北京市怀柔区渤海镇慕田峪村

note.pt: Trecho menos turístico que Badaling. Suba de teleférico, caminhe entre as torres 14-20. Transfer privado via DiDi ou hotel.
note.en: Less touristy than Badaling. Go up by cable car, walk between towers 14-20. Private transfer via DiDi or hotel.

note.pt: A descida pode ser de toboggan (trenó de montanha de 1.580m) — você controla a velocidade.
note.en: You can go down by toboggan (a 1,580m mountain slide) — you control the speed.

note.pt: Jantar reconfortante de pato laqueado no Siji Minfu após o dia pesado de caminhada.
note.en: Comforting Peking duck dinner at Siji Minfu after the long day of walking.

note.pt: Manhã final em Pequim e voo para as montanhas de Zhangjiajie (as 'montanhas Avatar').
note.en: Final morning in Beijing and the flight to the Zhangjiajie mountains (the 'Avatar mountains').

note.pt: Voo direto ~2h30 (só 2/dia). Backup: voar a Changsha e pegar trem-bala de 2h.
note.en: Direct flight ~2h30 (only 2/day). Backup: fly to Changsha and take a 2h bullet train.

items.address: 7 Tiantan Dongli, Dongcheng District, Beijing 100061 · 北京市东城区天坛内东里7号

note.pt: Parque cheio de locais fazendo tai chi de manhã — atmosfera única antes de ir ao aeroporto.
note.en: A park full of locals doing tai chi in the morning — a unique vibe before heading to the airport.

note.pt: Hotel em Wulingyuan, perto do parque. A cozinha de Hunan é apimentada — diga 'bù là' (不辣) para sem pimenta.
note.en: Hotel in Wulingyuan, near the park. Hunan food is spicy — say 'bù là' (不辣) for no chili.

note.pt: Tianmen Mountain de dia e o espetáculo noturno do 72 Wonder Tower.
note.en: Tianmen Mountain by day and the 72 Wonder Tower night show.

items.address: Tianmen Mountain Cableway Lower Station, Yongding District, Zhangjiajie · 张家界市永定区天门山索道下站

note.pt: Teleférico de 7,5km (o mais longo do mundo), 999 degraus, o portal 'Heaven's Gate' e a trilha de vidro no penhasco.
note.en: 7.5km cable car (longest in the world), 999 steps, the 'Heaven's Gate' arch and the glass walkway on the cliff.

items.address: Wulingyuan District, Zhangjiajie · 张家界市武陵源区

note.pt: Maior prédio em palafita do mundo (recorde Guinness); à noite, 3000 lâmpadas + projeções holográficas 7D.
note.en: World's tallest stilt building (Guinness record); at night, 3,000 lamps + 7D holographic projections.

note.pt: O parque nacional que inspirou as montanhas flutuantes de Avatar.
note.en: The national park that inspired the floating mountains in Avatar.

items.address: Zhangjiajie National Forest Park, Wulingyuan District, Zhangjiajie · 张家界国家森林公园 (武陵源区)

note.pt: Entrada por Wulingyuan (ingresso vale 4 dias); ônibus internos do parque circulam entre os mirantes.
note.en: Enter via Wulingyuan (ticket valid 4 days); internal park buses run between the viewpoints.

note.pt: Elevador de vidro de 326m cravado no penhasco — sobe em ~2min.
note.en: 326m glass elevator set into the cliff — goes up in ~2min.

note.pt: Glass Bridge de manhã e, à tarde, a vila milenar Tujia construída sobre uma cachoeira.
note.en: Glass Bridge in the morning and, in the afternoon, the ancient Tujia town built over a waterfall.

items.address: Zhangjiajie Grand Canyon Scenic Area, Sanguansi, Cili County · 张家界慈利县三官寺大峡谷风景区

note.pt: Ponte de vidro de 430m sobre o Grand Canyon; ingresso combo ¥178, reserva antecipada e passaporte obrigatórios.
note.en: 430m glass bridge over the Grand Canyon; ¥178 combo ticket, advance booking and passport required.

note.pt: Trem-bala de Zhangjiajie West até Furongzhen, 30min, mesma linha.
note.en: Bullet train from Zhangjiajie West to Furongzhen, 30min, same line.

items.address: Furong Ancient Town (Wangcun), Yongshun County, Xiangxi · 湘西州永顺县芙蓉镇

note.pt: A vila é construída sobre uma grande cachoeira; à noite ela é iluminada e dá pra passar por trás da queda d'água. Bem menos turística que Fenghuang.
note.en: The town is built over a big waterfall; at night it's lit and you can walk behind the falls. Far less touristy than Fenghuang.

note.pt: Manhã em Furong e, à tarde, a icônica vila ribeirinha de Fenghuang.
note.en: Morning in Furong and, in the afternoon, the iconic riverside town of Fenghuang.

note.pt: Aproveite a cachoeira sob o sol e os becos tranquilos antes de seguir.
note.en: Enjoy the waterfall in daylight and the quiet alleys before moving on.

note.pt: Trem-bala Furongzhen → Fenghuang Gucheng, 35-45min, mesma linha.
note.en: Bullet train Furongzhen → Fenghuang Gucheng, 35-45min, same line.

items.address: Fenghuang Ancient Town, Fenghuang County, Xiangxi · 湘西州凤凰县凤凰古城

note.pt: Casario de palafita (diaojiaolou) sobre o rio Tuojiang; à noite, uma das vilas antigas mais fotogênicas da China. Passeio de barco opcional.
note.en: Stilt houses (diaojiaolou) over the Tuojiang River; at night, one of the most photogenic old towns in China. Optional boat ride.

note.pt: Dia mais pesado de translado (~5-6h), terminando na espetacular vila de penhasco. Planeje a noite anterior tranquila.
note.en: The heaviest travel day (~5-6h), ending at the spectacular cliff village. Plan a calm night before.

note.pt: Fenghuang Gucheng → Huaihua South (25min) + Huaihua → Shangrao (~4h30). Compre os trens 1-2 semanas antes.
note.en: Fenghuang Gucheng → Huaihua South (25min) + Huaihua → Shangrao (~4h30). Buy the trains 1-2 weeks ahead.

note.pt: De Shangrao até o vale são mais ~1h de ônibus turístico ou DiDi.
note.en: From Shangrao to the valley it's another ~1h by tourist bus or DiDi.

items.address: Wangxian Valley, Shangrao, Jiangxi · 江西省上饶市望仙谷

note.pt: Vila '网红' cravada no penhasco, com cascatas e pontes suspensas; a iluminação noturna é o grande 'uau'. Durma dentro do vale.
note.en: An Instagram-famous village carved into the cliff, with waterfalls and suspension bridges; the night lighting is the big 'wow'. Sleep inside the valley.

note.pt: Manhã em Wangxian e, à noite, o primeiro gostinho de Shanghai no Bund.
note.en: Morning in Wangxian and, at night, the first taste of Shanghai on the Bund.

note.pt: Penhascos, fazendas em terraço, grutas e pontes de vidro à luz do dia.
note.en: Cliffs, terraced farms, caves and glass bridges in daylight.

note.pt: Shangrao → Shanghai Hongqiao, ~2h30-3h. Shangrao já está no corredor ferroviário para Shanghai.
note.en: Shangrao → Shanghai Hongqiao, ~2h30-3h. Shangrao is already on the rail corridor to Shanghai.

items.address: Zhongshan East 1st Rd, Huangpu District, Shanghai · 上海市黄浦区中山东一路

note.pt: Calçadão histórico à beira do rio Huangpu, com o skyline iluminado de Pudong do outro lado.
note.en: Historic waterfront promenade along the Huangpu River, with Pudong's lit skyline across the water.

note.pt: Shanghai clássica: do Bund e Yu Garden à charmosa Concessão Francesa.
note.en: Classic Shanghai: from the Bund and Yu Garden to the charming French Concession.

items.address: 168 Fuyou Rd, Huangpu District, Shanghai · 上海市黄浦区福佑路168号

note.pt: Jardim clássico Ming e o bazar antigo ao redor; almoce xiaolongbao no Jia Jia Tang Bao.
note.en: Classic Ming garden and the old bazaar around it; have xiaolongbao for lunch at Jia Jia Tang Bao.

items.address: Wukang Rd / Anfu Rd, Xuhui District, Shanghai · 上海市徐汇区武康路

note.pt: Tianzifang, Wukang Road e Anfu Road — cafés, butiques e ruas arborizadas com platanos.
note.en: Tianzifang, Wukang Road and Anfu Road — cafés, boutiques and plane-tree-lined streets.

items.address: 501 Yincheng Middle Rd, Pudong, Shanghai · 上海市浦东新区银城中路501号

note.pt: Mirante da Shanghai Tower (118º andar) ou um rooftop de frente para o Bund ao pôr do sol.
note.en: Shanghai Tower observation deck (118th floor) or a rooftop facing the Bund at sunset.

note.pt: Bate-volta a Suzhou, a 'Veneza do Oriente', a 30min de trem.
note.en: Day trip to Suzhou, the 'Venice of the East', 30min by train.

items.address: 178 Northeast St, Gusu District, Suzhou · 苏州市姑苏区东北街178号

note.pt: O jardim clássico chinês mais famoso (UNESCO); reserve pelo mini-program 苏州园林 ou pelo Trip.com.
note.en: The most famous classical Chinese garden (UNESCO); book via the 苏州园林 mini-program or Trip.com.

note.pt: Rua histórica Pingjiang com canais e lanternas; cuidado com seda falsa (a real cheira a cabelo queimado, não derrete).
note.en: Historic Pingjiang street with canals and lanterns; watch out for fake silk (real silk smells like burnt hair, doesn't melt).

note.pt: Bate-volta a Hangzhou pelo poético Lago Oeste, a 1h de trem.
note.en: Day trip to Hangzhou for the poetic West Lake, 1h by train.

items.address: West Lake, Xihu District, Hangzhou · 杭州市西湖区西湖

note.pt: Lago Oeste (UNESCO): passeio de barco, pagodes e caminhos arborizados à beira d'água.
note.en: West Lake (UNESCO): boat ride, pagodas and tree-lined paths along the water.

items.address: 1 Fayun Lane, Lingyin Rd, Xihu District, Hangzhou · 杭州市西湖区灵隐路法云弄1号

note.pt: Templo Lingyin e as plantações de chá verde Longjing (Dragon Well) nas colinas.
note.en: Lingyin Temple and the Longjing (Dragon Well) green-tea plantations in the hills.

note.pt: Uma water town do Jiangnan de manhã e a Shanghai moderna à tarde.
note.en: A Jiangnan water town in the morning and modern Shanghai in the afternoon.

note.pt: Zhujiajiao (~1h, dentro de Shanghai, fácil) ou Wuzhen (~1h30, mais bonita).
note.en: Zhujiajiao (~1h, within Shanghai, easy) or Wuzhen (~1h30, prettier).

note.pt: À tarde, a Power Station of Art ou o distrito de arte M50.
note.en: In the afternoon, the Power Station of Art or the M50 art district.

note.pt: Bate-volta opcional a Nanjing, antiga capital, a 1h de trem — ou um dia extra em Shanghai.
note.en: Optional day trip to Nanjing, a former capital, 1h by train — or an extra day in Shanghai.

note.pt: Muralha Ming, Memorial Sun Yat-sen e o Templo de Confúcio (Fuzimiao).
note.en: Ming city wall, Sun Yat-sen Memorial and the Confucius Temple (Fuzimiao).

note.pt: Dia livre para repetir o que mais gostou e ver os bairros que faltaram.
note.en: Free day to repeat what you loved most and see the neighborhoods you missed.

note.pt: Cruzeiro pelo Huangpu para ver o skyline da água, de dia ou à noite.
note.en: Huangpu cruise to see the skyline from the water, day or night.

note.pt: Compras finais e dia-colchão proposital para imprevistos.
note.en: Final shopping and a deliberate buffer day for the unexpected.

note.pt: Eletrônicos em Huaihai Rd, chá e lembranças.
note.en: Electronics on Huaihai Rd, tea and souvenirs.

note.pt: Folga para atrasos, cansaço, refazer algo — ou o Mutianyu remanejado se o tempo virou em Pequim.
note.en: Slack for delays, tiredness, redoing something — or Mutianyu rescheduled if the weather turned in Beijing.

note.pt: Saída de Shanghai com folga grande no aeroporto, porque a Turkish costuma atrasar.
note.en: Departure from Shanghai with a big buffer at the airport, because Turkish often runs late.

note.pt: Trem de levitação magnética de Longyang até o aeroporto: 7min a 430km/h, vale a experiência.
note.en: Maglev train from Longyang to the airport: 7min at 430km/h, worth the experience.

note.pt: Conexão curta em Istambul e volta para casa no mesmo dia.
note.en: Short connection in Istanbul and back home the same day.

note.pt: Conexão dentro do aeroporto, sem tempo de cidade.
note.en: Connection inside the airport, no city time.

note.pt: Conexão apertada de ~2h em GRU; se o TK15 atrasar, rebooking no balcão.
note.en: Tight ~2h connection at GRU; if TK15 is late, rebook at the counter.
